candidates.why: Component of revenue but not full top-line; a more comprehensive total exists.
Component of revenue but not full top-line; a more comprehensive total exists.
Explicit total revenue line aggregating passenger, ancillary, freight and other revenue; best representation of top-line sales.
This is an expense, not revenue; should not be used for REVT.
Component of revenue; not the full top-line total.
Balancing adjustment line, not the primary revenue figure.

variables.notes: Total operating revenue is the clear aggregate top-line revenue figure.

candidates.why: Represents inventory of consumables on the balance sheet, not an expense line. True COGS line likely exists in the income statement but is not among the candidates.

variables.notes: No proper COGS or cost of sales expense line is present among candidates. 'Consumables' is a balance sheet inventory item, not COGS; leaving COGS unmapped requires manual review.

candidates.why: Classic SG&A personnel/overhead cost for staff; fits operating overhead definition.
Explicitly stock-based compensation in SG&A; clearly part of SG&A overhead.
Broad operating overhead bucket; appropriate SG&A-type expense excluding specified non-SG&A items.
Net other operating expenses, another SG&A-style overhead component.
Personnel-related overhead within SG&A; separate component line.
Share-based compensation, which is part of SG&A overhead when not classified in COGS.
Personnel overhead for hired crew, consistent with SG&A/operating overhead personnel costs.

variables.notes: Multiple SG&A-style overhead components are present and none are totals, so all are included per instructions.
No R&D-related line items are available among candidates; XRD treated as missing/zero.

candidates.why: Primary interest expense line; best representation of financing cost.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Component of total interest expense specific to lease liabilities; more granular but not the broadest measure.
Residual/balancing part of interest expense; not the main total.
Represents minority interest in profit, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; component rather than overall interest expense.
Equity attributable to minority shareholders; not an interest expense.
Same as non-controlling interests; equity, not interest expense.

variables.notes: Use the main Interest Expense line as XINT; more granular lease-interest components are not needed for this mapping.

candidates.why: Represents shareholders’ equity; appears as both a line item and effectively the total, but an explicit 'Total equity' line is also provided.
Component of equity, not the total.
Paid-in equity component, not the full book equity.
Explicit total equity line including all components; best representation of book equity.
Balancing adjustment; not the true equity amount.
Balancing adjustment; not the true equity amount.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing adjustment for the full balance sheet; not equity alone.
Represents total assets/total liabilities and equity; not equity alone.

variables.notes: Total equity is the clearest measure of book shareholders’ equity.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation of profit to non-controlling interests; flow, not balance, but a balance sheet equivalent exists.
OCI component attributable to minority interests, not the equity balance itself.
Balance sheet item representing minority interest in equity; best match for MIB.
Alternate label for non-controlling interests; but the primary non-controlling interest line is sufficient.
Income statement total profit attributable to minority interest; not the balance of minority equity.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Total comprehensive income attributable to minority interest; not the equity balance.

variables.notes: Use the balance sheet Non-controlling interests line as the minority interest (MIB) balance.
